<a id="class-startxr"></a>

# StartXR

**Inherits:** `Node`

OpenXR bootstrap for Arena. Handles session lifecycle, refresh rate selection, focus pause, and recentre events.

## Properties

| `int`              | [maximum_refresh_rate](#class-startxr-property-maximum-refresh-rate)       | `90`        |
|--------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------|
| `OpenXRInterface`  | [xr_interface](#class-startxr-property-xr-interface)                       |             |
| `Variant`          | [xr_is_focussed](#class-startxr-property-xr-is-focussed)                   | `false`     |
| `float`            | [debug_thickness](#class-startxr-property-debug-thickness)                 | `0.1`       |
| `float`            | [debug_center_brightness](#class-startxr-property-debug-center-brightness) | `0.8`       |
| `bool`             | [passthrough_enabled](#class-startxr-property-passthrough-enabled)         | `true`      |
| `WorldEnvironment` | [world_environment](#class-startxr-property-world-environment)             | `<unknown>` |

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-startxr-private-method-ready"></a>

 **\_ready**() [🔗](#class-startxr-private-method-ready)

Initialises OpenXR on the current viewport and hooks runtime callbacks.

---

<a id="class-startxr-private-method-on-openxr-session-begun"></a>

 **\_on_openxr_session_begun**() [🔗](#class-startxr-private-method-on-openxr-session-begun)

Picks best available refresh rate then aligns physics tick rate to it.

---

<a id="class-startxr-private-method-on-openxr-visible-state"></a>

 **\_on_openxr_visible_state**() [🔗](#class-startxr-private-method-on-openxr-visible-state)

Marks focus lost and pauses processing when headset session is only visible.

---

<a id="class-startxr-private-method-on-openxr-focused-state"></a>

 **\_on_openxr_focused_state**() [🔗](#class-startxr-private-method-on-openxr-focused-state)

Restores processing when headset session is focused again.

---

<a id="class-startxr-private-method-on-openxr-stopping"></a>

 **\_on_openxr_stopping**() [🔗](#class-startxr-private-method-on-openxr-stopping)

Handles runtime session stop and exits in automated simulator test mode.

---

<a id="class-startxr-private-method-on-openxr-pose-recentered"></a>

 **\_on_openxr_pose_recentered**() [🔗](#class-startxr-private-method-on-openxr-pose-recentered)

Relays recentre events so other nodes can reposition their content.

---

<a id="class-startxr-method-enable-passthrough"></a>

`bool` **enable_passthrough**() [🔗](#class-startxr-method-enable-passthrough)

Enables passthrough if available, otherwise uses alpha blend mode fallback.
